title: Script
description: Structured content script produced by the script stage. Contains ordered scenes with visual, voiceover, and on-screen text for each segment.

brief_id.description: ID of the ContentBrief this script was produced for.

research_pack_id.description: ID of the ResearchPack used as the factual basis for this script.

angle_id.description: ID of the ContentAngle this script is built around.

format.description: Content format this script is written for.

language.description: BCP-47 language code for the script content (e.g. en, uk, ru).

scenes.description: Ordered list of scenes that make up the script. Must contain at least one scene.

scene_id.description: Unique identifier for this scene within the script.

order.description: Position of this scene in the sequence. Starts at 1.

duration_sec.description: Duration of this scene in seconds. Null for non-video formats.

visual_description.description: Description of what is shown visually in this scene. Used as input for media planning.

voiceover.description: Spoken text for this scene. Null if no voiceover is required.

on_screen_text.description: Text displayed on screen during this scene (captions, titles, labels). Null if not applicable.

notes.description: Production notes or directions for this scene (e.g. pacing, tone, transitions). Null if none.

cta.description: Call to action appended after the final scene. Null if no CTA is required for this content.

total_duration_sec.description: Sum of all scene durations in seconds. Required (non-null) for short_video and long_video formats. Null for all other formats. Must match the brief's duration_sec constraint when set.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this script was created.
